query:
UPDATE riviamigo.trips
               SET start_geofence_id = COALESCE(start_geofence_id, $2),
                   end_geofence_id   = COALESCE(end_geofence_id,   $3),
                   start_address_id  = COALESCE(start_address_id,  $4),
                   end_address_id    = COALESCE(end_address_id,    $5)
               WHERE id = $1
